description: CompositionGreen crew neck T-shirt made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves, fabric tape on in-seam of the neckline and nike swoosh printed on the right chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsLightweight and breathable, this jersey from nike is designed with the environment in mind; its sweat-wicking mesh Dri-Fit fabric has been made from the equivalent of eight recycled plastic bottles. Dri-Fit fabric helps keep you dry and comfortable by wicking sweat away from the skin to the fabric's surface, where it quickly evaporates, This tee also has finished hems to prevent fraying and deliver a polished look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of shoulders 18”
